scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && node --test tests/*.mjs
scripts.build:data: python3 tools/extract_materials.py --source-dir materials --output-dir content/extracted --manifest content/materials.json && python3 tools/build_site_data.py --notes-dir notes --materials content/materials.json --output content/notes.json
